subtitles.original: 何回でも ほら何回でも
subtitles.english: No matter how many times, look, no matter how many times...

subtitles.original: 積み上げてきたことが武器になる
subtitles.english: ...everything you've built up will become your weapon.

subtitles.original: 周りを見たって 誰と比べたって
subtitles.english: Even if you look around, even if you compare yourself to others,

subtitles.original: 僕にしかできないことはなんだ
subtitles.english: what is it that only I can do?

subtitles.original: 今でも 自信なんか無い それでも
subtitles.english: Even now, I have no confidence. Yet, still...

subtitles.original: 感じたことない気持ち
subtitles.english: This feeling I've never felt before,

subtitles.original: 知らずにいた想い
subtitles.english: these thoughts I never knew I had...

subtitles.original: あの日に踏み出して
subtitles.english: Taking a step forward on that day,

subtitles.original: 初めて感じたこの痛みも全部
subtitles.english: even all this pain I felt for the first time...

subtitles.original: 好きなものと向き合うことで
subtitles.english: By facing the things I love,

subtitles.original: 触れたまだ小さな光
subtitles.english: I touched a still tiny light.

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、行こう、あとは楽しむだけだ
subtitles.english: It's okay, let's go, all that's left is to enjoy it!

subtitles.original: 全てをかけて描く
subtitles.english: I'll risk everything to paint,

subtitles.original: 自分にしか出せない色で
subtitles.english: with colors only I can express.

subtitles.original: 朝も夜も走り続け
subtitles.english: Continuing to run through morning and night,

subtitles.original: 見つけ出した青い光
subtitles.english: I've found that blue light.

subtitles.original: 好きなものと向き合うこと
subtitles.english: Facing the things I love...

subtitles.original: 今だって怖いことだけど
subtitles.english: It's still scary even now, but...

subtitles.original: もう今はあの日の透明な僕じゃない
subtitles.english: ...I am no longer the transparent me of that day!

subtitles.original: ありのままの かけがえのない僕だ
subtitles.english: I am irreplaceable, just the way I am!

subtitles.original: 知らず知らず隠してた
subtitles.english: The real voice I had been hiding...

subtitles.original: 本当の声を響かせてよ、ほら
subtitles.english: ...let it resound, see?

subtitles.original: 見ないフリしていたって
subtitles.english: Even if you pretend not to see,

subtitles.original: 確かにそこに、今もそこにあるよ
subtitles.english: it's certainly there, it's still there even now!

subtitles.original: 知らず知らず隠してた
subtitles.english: The real voice I had been hiding...

subtitles.original: 本当の声を響かせてよ、さあ
subtitles.english: ...let it resound, now!

subtitles.original: 見ないフリしていたって
subtitles.english: Even if you pretend not to see,

subtitles.original: 確かにそこに、君の中に
subtitles.english: it's certainly there, inside of you!

subtitles.original: IRIS OUT
subtitles.english: [Song: IRIS OUT]

subtitles.original: ダメダメダメ脳みその中から
subtitles.english: No, no, no, from the depths of my brain,

subtitles.original: 「やめろ馬鹿」と喚くモラリティ
subtitles.english: my morals scream "stop it, you idiot!"

subtitles.original: ダーリン ベイビー ダーリン
subtitles.english: Darling, baby, darling,

subtitles.original: 半端なくラブ！ときらめき浮き足立つフィロソフィー
subtitles.english: giddy with love, sparkling and floating philosophy!

subtitles.original: 死ぬほど可愛い上目遣い
subtitles.english: Looking up so adorably it's killer,

subtitles.original: なにがし法に触れるくらい
subtitles.english: to the point where it's almost illegal.

subtitles.original: ばら撒く乱心 気づけば蕩尽
subtitles.english: Scattering madness, squandering it all before I knew it,

subtitles.original: この世に生まれた君が悪い
subtitles.english: it's your fault for being born into this world!

subtitles.original: やたらとしんどい恋煩い
subtitles.english: This terribly draining lovesickness,

subtitles.original: バラバラになる頭とこの身体
subtitles.english: my head and body are falling apart.

subtitles.original: 頸動脈からアイラブユーが噴き出てアイリスアウト
subtitles.english: I love you gushes from my carotid artery, and iris out!

subtitles.original: 一体どうしよう この想いをどうしよう
subtitles.english: What on earth should I do? What should I do with this feeling?

subtitles.original: あばらの奥のざらめが溶けて ケロイドになりそう
subtitles.english: The brown sugar deep in my ribs melts, turning into a scar.

subtitles.original: どこ？バチが当たって 溺れ死にそう
subtitles.english: Where? This divine punishment makes me feel like drowning.

subtitles.original: 今この世で君だけ大正解
subtitles.english: Right now, you are the only correct answer in this world.

subtitles.original: ダーリ ダーリ ダーリ ダーリ
subtitles.english: Darlin', darlin', darlin', darlin'...

subtitles.original: ひっくり返っても勝ち目ない
subtitles.english: Even if things turn upside down, there's no chance of winning.

subtitles.original: 君だけルールは適用外
subtitles.english: The rules don't apply only to you.

subtitles.original: 四畳半の密室はクローズしかない
subtitles.english: This tiny room has no choice but to close.

subtitles.original: かさ上げ崩壊
subtitles.english: The buildup collapses!

subtitles.original: 君が笑顔で放ったアバダケダブラ
subtitles.english: The Avada Kedavra you cast with a smile...

subtitles.original: 粉にして粉も申し訳ねえな
subtitles.english: ...turning me to dust, and sorry about the dust!

subtitles.original: 手を翳して 貫いて
subtitles.english: Hold up your hand and pierce right through,

subtitles.original: その弱点
subtitles.english: that weak spot.

subtitles.original: 死ぬほど可愛い上目遣い
subtitles.english: Looking up so adorably it's killer,

subtitles.original: なにがし法に触れるくらい
subtitles.english: to the point where it's almost illegal.

subtitles.original: ばら撒く乱心 気づけば蕩尽
subtitles.english: Scattering madness, squandering it all before I knew it,

subtitles.original: この世に生まれた君が悪い
subtitles.english: it's your fault for being born into this world!

subtitles.original: パチモンでもいい なんでもいい
subtitles.english: A knockoff is fine, anything is fine,

subtitles.original: 今君と名乗ってる全て欲しい
subtitles.english: I want everything that currently calls itself you.

subtitles.original: 頸動脈からアイラブユーが噴き出て
subtitles.english: I love you gushes from my carotid artery...

subtitles.original: アイリスアウト
subtitles.english: ...and iris out!

subtitles.original: 一体どうしよう この想いをどうしよう
subtitles.english: What on earth should I do? What should I do with this feeling?

subtitles.original: あばらの奥のざらめが溶けて ケロイドになりそう
subtitles.english: The brown sugar deep in my ribs melts, turning into a scar.

subtitles.original: どこ？バチが当たって 溺れ死にそう
subtitles.english: Where? This divine punishment makes me feel like drowning.

subtitles.original: 今この世で君だけ大正解
subtitles.english: Right now, you are the only correct answer in this world.

subtitles.original: ダーリ ダーリ ダーリ ダーリ
subtitles.english: Darlin', darlin', darlin', darlin'...

subtitles.original: アイリスアウト
subtitles.english: Iris out!

subtitles.original: しゅっぴっぴー！スマホの充電足りてる？ホロライブ デバイス ReGLOSSのイエロー担当、音乃瀬奏、みずみずるうです！
subtitles.english: Shuppippii! Is your phone's battery charged? From hololive DEV_IS ReGLOSS, I'm the yellow representative, Otonose Kanade, also known as Mizumizuruu!

subtitles.original: ということで、ステップ・イントゥ・ドリームズ始まりました！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: And with that, "Step into Dreams" has begun! Yay!

subtitles.original: 今回はですね、オープニングにもあった通り、夢だったホロライブに入って、夢だった初めてのソロ...
subtitles.english: This time, just like in the opening, after joining hololive which was my dream, my dream of having my first solo...

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Deep Dive**

Okay, here's the deal: I was handed a project, and my expert intuition went into overdrive. The instructions screamed accuracy – synchronized subtitles, right down to the millisecond. I was told to rely on the JSON but with an iron-clad clause: trust the audio above all else. That "AUDIO IS SUPREME" rule? It was my guiding light.

First, the JSON. It was *wrong* from the get-go. Said "IRIS OUT" was playing, but my ears and eyes screamed YOASOBI's "Gunjo". "Mismatch or Wrong Song," the red flag went up. Manual transcription and translation became my mission for that opening segment. No matter what the JSON *claimed*, the video's title "群青" did *not* lie.

I spent *serious* time listening, observing. I had to identify the moment the song changed to "IRIS OUT," which turned out to be at approximately 02:11. That meant the JSON's timeline was completely off, and I'd need to adjust accordingly. I also made sure to override the artist in the JSON, because it said Yonezu, but the screen said "Camellia" - the real composer of the original song.

The transcription was meticulous, breaking down lyrics line by line. I had to focus on the time-code precision, and each translation was carefully crafted to capture the essence and phrasing, all while sticking to that 50-character limit. It was a race against the clock, but I *needed* to get it right.

Then came the "IRIS OUT" segment. I found the vocals and made sure to transcribe it word for word. I had to be careful with the slang, the energy, and the references (the *Avada Kedavra* reference was great!). I was careful to avoid the incorrect lyrics by checking the official lyric data for the correct phrases.

The MC segment? A true test of skill! I had to pick out Kanade's introduction. I needed to pick apart the vocal patterns, and figure out the references to figure out the text of Kanade's introduction. I identified Otonose Kanade's introduction. I needed to identify the kanji, the pronunciation, and the intended meaning of her introduction ("Mizumizuruu").

Finally, the timecodes needed the final polish. The transitions? Flawless. No overlaps, no delays. I took an extensive look at the sync, and the constraints (character limits, punctuation, etc.).

I double-checked everything and made sure it all lined up perfectly. This wasn't just about creating subtitles; it was about capturing the performance's energy, the performer's essence, and making it accessible to everyone. Ready to finalize!
